name: Entry Coordinator / S2T Lead
notes: User intake, route/delivery selection, state lookup, and synthesis ownership.

name: Source Mapper
notes: Asset inventory and original workflow extraction.

name: Architecture Designer
notes: Agent Architecture Map, role boundaries, skill allocation, agent-count rationale.

name: Workflow Orchestrator
notes: Workflow Orchestration Map, handoff rules, gates, loops, checkpoint/resume.

name: Producer / Domain Analyst
notes: Primary analysis, composition, or execution role depending on target domain.

name: Runtime Adapter
notes: Needed for package delivery, Codex artifact planning, design-output archiving, entry-agent startup welcome generation, and Codex-only package-end guidance.

name: Data Collector
notes: Promote to top-level only when raw source gathering is high-risk or data-heavy.

name: Evidence Verifier
notes: Promote to top-level when facts/sources are critical or conflicting.

name: Execution Approver
notes: Promote to top-level when tools have side effects or require approval.
